positive: A whimsical and energetic portrait of a mythical celestial fox spirit (kitsune) seated on a stylized crescent moon, surrounded by floating bioluminescent cherry blossoms and ethereal cosmic dust. The fox should have intricate, flowing fur and glowing sapphire eyes, depicted in a modern 'mystical pop' aesthetic. The composition must be highly graphic, with clean silhouettes and strong contrast, allowing the spirit to dominate the central space. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep midnight blues, vibrant sapphire blues, glowing cyan, and soft magenta highlights. Style the artwork to look like a highly refined vector graphic illustration suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be contained within a central, visually impactful area.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, signature, logo, watermark, text, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, photorealism, messy background, cartoon, graffiti
